items.name: navdristi
items.description: Nav Dristi is a Chhattisgarh-focused public-services and grievance-resolution portal. It is designed like a state-level national portal, but it goes beyond service discovery by also handling complaint submission, AI-assisted routing, officer tracking, escalation, women safety, elder emergency support, and printable official records.

items.name: YouTube-Transcript-Assistant
items.description: A lightweight, privacy-focused Greasemonkey/Tampermonkey userscript that extracts YouTube transcripts directly from your browser session. It allows you to save timestamped transcripts as `.txt` files or send them to an LLM (via OpenRouter/OpenAI) for an instant, beautifully formatted HTML summary directly on the page.

items.name: todo-API-REST
items.description: Esta API fue desarrollada utilizando Node.js junto con Express.js, lo que permite construir un servidor rápido, escalable y fácil de mantener.
